securityRecoveryKeysPanel.macosOnlyRevealsTheFileVaultPersonalReco: macOS only reveals the FileVault personal recovery key when it is rotated, and rotation must be authorized by a FileVault-enabled user (or the current recovery key). Credentials are used once and not stored.

pamPamRulesTab.description: Software policies are evaluated first — an allowlist/blocklist match decides before these rules. Rules then run in priority order (lowest first); the first match decides.

empty.title: No PAM rules yet

umbrella.label: Cisco Umbrella
umbrella.helpText: API key + secret from the Umbrella Reporting API; organizationId from your Umbrella dashboard URL.

cloudflare.label: Cloudflare Gateway
cloudflare.helpText: API token with Zero Trust → Gateway → Read scope.

dnsfilter.label: DNSFilter
dnsfilter.helpText: API key from your DNSFilter account settings; account ID required only for multi-tenant scopes.

pihole.label: Pi-hole
pihole.helpText: Pi-hole API endpoint + API key. Use the LAN-routable hostname.

adguardHome.label: AdGuard Home
adguardHome.helpText: API endpoint + HTTP Basic auth username (apiKey) + password (apiSecret).
